creator: cordeiro@nic.br
text:
Hello Edwin.

I approve the patch for this bug fix, please commit it.

Thanks,
Cordeiro

On Domingo, 20 de Abril de 2008, Edwin Groothuis <Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org>> wrote:
> Maintainer of security/chkrootkit,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/122941 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/122941
>
